llm_values.evidence: The agent successfully navigated through the United Airlines website (Travel Info -> Baggage Info -> Checked Bags -> Calculate bag costs) and opened the "Checked bag fee calculator" page. The final screenshot at step 11 clearly shows the calculator fully loaded with the URL `united.com/en/us/checked-bag-fee-calculator/any-flights`. The agent properly emitted DONE, fulfilling the exact instructions of the task, but the environment returned a reward of 0.0. This indicates an outdated or overly strict evaluation function (e.g., expecting an older URL format like `baggage-calculator`).
llm_values.correction: The underlying evaluation script should be updated to accept the current URL (`/checked-bag-fee-calculator/any-flights`) or DOM structure for the United Airlines baggage fee calculator. The agent successfully completed the task but was incorrectly penalized.
